step_rationale: Polyunsaturated acylcarnitine accumulates during ischemic mitochondrial β-oxidation failure.
mechanism: Ischemia-reperfusion impairs mitochondrial fatty-acid oxidation, elevating long-chain acylcarnitines as injury markers.

references.title: Metabolomic characterization of myocardial ischemia-reperfusion injury in ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction patients undergoing percutaneous coronary intervention.
